title: Magical Crispy Australian Turkish Delight Skewers
description: A savory and crispy Australian dish featuring Turkish Delight, infused oil, and vegan-friendly ingredients, perfect for kids and adults alike.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together chickpea flour, salt, and paprika.
Gradually add water to the bowl and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Cut the Turkish Delight into 1-inch cubes and thread onto the bamboo skewers.
Dip each skewer into the batter, coating the Turkish Delight evenly.
Roll the battered skewers in vegan panko breadcrumbs to coat.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the infused oil over the skewers and sprinkle with lemon juice.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
